entry.title: MAGA
entry.content:
Fake news
Good morning, dear classmates. Volunteers are now being recruited for the Republican storming of the Capitol.
[Activity Content]
Storm the US Capitol with guns.
[Activity Time]
13:00 EST on November 6 - end time unknown.
[Activity Location]
Capitol Building, Washington, D.C., United States of America.
[Registration Method]
Students who are interested in participating are requested to register first on the Hetang Yu Classroom activity page. Then, please arrive at the Capitol in Washington, D.C. before November 5 and scan the QR code to check in.
[Precautions]
There is no limit to the number of participants in this activity;
The duration of this storming of the Capitol cannot be predicted for a single time period. Please ensure that all volunteers have sufficient time;
After the activity, all volunteers are requested to register and check out at the US House of Representatives with a red baseball cap printed with “MAGA”.
This activity will be counted as 6 labor - hour volunteer hours.

entry.title: CTF
entry.content: CTF（Capture The Flag，中文一般译为夺旗赛）起源于 1996 年的 DEFCON 全球黑客大会，是网络安全技术人员之间进行技术竞技的一种比赛形式。参赛团队或选手需要通过各种攻击手法，获取服务器后寻找指定的字段，或者文件中某一个固定格式的字段（这个字段叫做 flag，其形式一般为 flag {xxxxxxxx}），提交到裁判机就可以得分。

​—
title:测试文章
date:2024-11-02 20:56:42
tags:Text
​—

这是一篇测试文章

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.

Quick Start

Create a new post

More info: Writing

Run server

More info: Server

Generate static files

More info: Generating

Deploy to remote sites

More info: Deployment
